2.1 Comparison of 27 CCW and 30 CCW Chronic Condition Algorithms 

To ascertain the impact of the updated algorithms for the chronic conditions, the CCW team empirically examined the 
prevalence of conditions using the 27 CCW Chronic Conditions (27 CCW) compared to the 30 CCW
